channel.title: php on Julian Xhokaxhiu's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in php on Julian Xhokaxhiu's Blog

item.title: How to install Bolt CMS on Namecheap Shared Hosting
item.description: Hi guys, you probably have already noticed it, but the blog had changed. Yeah, a completly new look, new functions (such as search one) and completely responsive too (try resizing your window).

item.title: TwigPress: a boilerplate Twig engine theme for Wordpress
item.description: Good evening guys, today I would like to show you the evolution of my last discussion about Twig for Wordpres. Since I’ve studied all the source code and I found more good techniques to implement Wordpress API calls, I’ve decided to create a brand new engine rather than refactoring the old one.

item.title: When Wordpress meets Twig
item.description: Good evening guys, what I’ve done those days? Well, today I would like to share with you something cool I’ve found. What happens when you love Wordpress but you don’t like its templating system?

item.title: Pushing Wordpress performance to the limits!
item.description: Hi guys, first I would like to say sorry for the long time of silence i kept here, but as you may know I’m always a little busy :) This month I tried to archive so many goals which couldn’t be mentioned here, but If you follow me on Twitter you’ll be updated with all the projects I’m working on.

item.title: Rapid script to test 'Etag' and 'Last-Modified' HTTP Headers
item.description: Are you searching for a rapid PHP script to test “Etag” or “Last-Modified” HTTP Headers in your project? Here we go, made in PHP. Enjoy
